task.json description and setup_task.sh line 46 and 64
Houston is a real city in Texas (verified via web search)
Official two-letter state abbreviation for Texas (verified via FAA and state sources)
Valid Houston, TX ZIP code (verified via US ZIP code databases). Located in southern Houston area, Harris County. Population ~28,896 residents.
Web search for address returned no real property with this exact address. Search returned nearby addresses (4712 Carmen St) but no 4712 Magnolia Boulevard in Houston 77033.

Phone uses 555-0100 to 555-0199 range which is officially reserved for fictional use in media (per Wikipedia, TV Tropes, NANPA). The 555 exchange was reserved by telephone companies starting in the 1960s for use in films, television, and other fictional media to prevent real-world contact.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic data. The student 'Alondra Reyes' is created fresh in the OpenSIS database via setup script (setup_task.sh) with no real-world data source. Houston, TX is verified as a real city. TX is the correct state abbreviation. ZIP code 77033 is verified as a valid Houston ZIP code in the southern area. The street address '4712 Magnolia Boulevard' does not appear in real estate databases and appears to be fictional. The phone number '713-555-0198' uses the 555-01xx range officially reserved for fictional use in media and entertainment, confirming it is not a real, assignable phone number.
